description_short: Ergonomic lumbar cushion with contoured support, breathable memory foam, and a compact design that fits wherever you sit.

construction_layers.name: Memory Foam Roll
construction_layers.notes: Contours to lumbar curve. Roll shape fills lower-back gap.

faq_specs.question: What makes this the best lumbar support cushion for office chair use?
faq_specs.answer: It fills the gap between your lower back and the chair, encouraging healthier posture.

notes_observed: Smaller and more affordable than Pro/Slim back cushions — narrow roll form (only 203mm wide). Different use case: targets lumbar gap specifically vs full back.
